content.note: Visual reference showing the four alert banner types. Types are Primary, Success, Warning, and Danger.
Spacing between icon and text uses --zen-spacing-xs (16px icon size).

content.rule: Each alert type uses a specific background color token tied to its semantic meaning.
examples: Info (Primary) - info-filled icon with info background
Success - success-filled icon with success background
Warning - warning-filled icon with warning background
Error (Danger) - error-filled icon with error background

content.note: Suggested spacing in between alert banners and other elements around is 16px (spacing-md) but this can be reduced if space is limited or the element is directly related to the banner.
